## Validation

- [ ] tvOS simulator build
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Physical Apple TV validation required before release

## Apple platform review

- [ ] Native Apple API/component used where available
- [ ] Directional focus and focus restoration verified
- [ ] VoiceOver labels, values and hints verified
- [ ] Reduce Motion verified
- [ ] Reduce Transparency and Increase Contrast verified
- [ ] All user-facing strings use String Catalogs
- [ ] Loading, empty, failure and retry states included
- [ ] Privacy, entitlements and Keychain/iCloud boundaries reviewed
- [ ] Performance and main-actor impact reviewed
